name: conversations.create
description: Create a global or project conversation. Legacy agent_dm input is accepted and normalized to dm.

project_id.description: Project ID to create the conversation in. Required for project-scoped conversations; omit for global_user_home.

title.description: Optional conversation title (required for topic scope)

participant_ids.description: Optional list of participant IDs to add initially

user_id.description: ID of the user creating the conversation

org_id.description: Optional organization ID for multi-tenant context
